empty.subtitle: What's on your mind?
subtitleVariants: What can I help you with?
Where would you like to begin?
empty.lead: Ask anything. Outlines, code, decisions, reading — Aivory will think alongside you.
empty.disclaimer: Aivory can make mistakes. Check anything important.
empty.drawLead: Describe what you want to create — your gallery is below.

composer.placeholder: Ask anything — or paste your thinking.
composer.voiceUnsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser.
composer.verifyTooltip: Have a second model fact-check the answer
composer.longTextAttachedTitle: Attaching long text as a file
composer.longTextAttachedBody: Text over {{max}} characters is being uploaded as {{name}}.
composer.attachedHint: Attachments are visual-only in this build.
composer.documentScopeRequired: Create a conversation before uploading documents.
composer.storageQuotaFull: Storage is full — free up space in Files and try again.

features.title: Features
features.researchDesc: Plan, search the web across rounds, and write a cited report.
features.verifyDesc: A second model fact-checks the answer after it is written.
features.noToolsDesc: Answer directly without calling any tool — faster and cheaper.
features.webSearchDesc: Search the web every turn and add the results to the prompt (no tool call).

actions.readAloudMocked: Reading aloud is mocked in this build.

message.refused: The model declined to answer this request.

moderation.title: Content blocked
moderation.body: Your message may violate our usage terms.
moderation.cta: Please edit your message and try again.

quota.title: Quota reached
quota.body: You've used up your group's quota for this model. Upgrade your plan to keep going.

share.title: Share conversation
share.body: Create a public link to a read-only snapshot of this conversation. Later messages stay private.
share.bodyShared: Anyone with this link can view a read-only snapshot of this conversation.
share.publicHint: Public — no sign-in needed to view.
share.missingBody: The link may be wrong, or the owner has unshared this conversation.
share.footer: Shared from Aivory — a thoughtful AI workspace.

code.engineFailed: Could not load the Python engine — check your connection and retry.
code.poweredBy: Executed in your browser by Pyodide
code.previewSandboxHint: Rendered in an isolated sandbox — page scripts cannot reach your data.
code.mermaidFailed: Could not render this diagram — showing source.

diagram.title: Diagram
diagram.hint: Scroll to zoom, drag to pan.

sidebar.renameHint: Give it a name you'll find later.
sidebar.archivedBody: Unarchive to bring a chat back to your list.
sidebar.deleteBody: This will remove the conversation and all its messages. This can't be undone.

files.title: Files in this chat
files.hint: Files the model can read in this conversation. Removing one stops it being used in future replies — the message that uploaded it stays.
files.empty: No files yet. Add one to let the model read it.

inline.title: Sub-conversation
inline.empty: Ask anything about the highlighted passage.

thread.jumpOtherBranch: That message is on a different branch of this conversation.
thread.modelSwitchedBody: Future messages will use the new model.
thread.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, or the link is wrong.

outline-essay.title: Outline a long-form essay
outline-essay.prompt: Help me outline a 2,000-word essay on attention as a moral skill.

study-plan.title: Design a study plan
study-plan.prompt: Design a four-week reading plan to learn about complexity theory.

debug-snippet.title: Read this code with me
debug-snippet.prompt: I have a TypeScript function that loses focus after a re-render — help me debug it.

research-brief.title: Draft a research brief
research-brief.prompt: Summarize the strongest counterarguments to universal basic income.

travel-idea.title: Plan a slow trip
travel-idea.prompt: I have ten days in October. Help me sketch a slow, quiet route through Portugal.

creative-brief.title: Name something carefully
creative-brief.prompt: Give me 8 candidate names for an editorial newsletter about climate finance.

difficult-decision.title: Think through a decision
difficult-decision.prompt: Walk me through a decision matrix for whether I should leave my job to write.

library-curation.title: Recommend a small library
library-curation.prompt: Suggest 5 short books on solitude — different traditions, no overlap.

filePreview.failed: Couldn't load this file for preview.
filePreview.unsupported: This file type can't be previewed in the browser.

deleteRound.title: Delete this exchange?
deleteRound.body: This removes this question and its answer from the conversation. Earlier and later messages are kept.

gallery.heading: My gallery
gallery.empty: No images yet — draw something above.

workspace.createBody: A separate, shared space — its conversations, projects and knowledge bases are visible to every member.
workspace.limitReached: Workspace limit reached for your plan.
workspace.inviteRotated: New invite link generated — the old one is dead.
workspace.inviteRotateFailed: Could not rotate the invite link.
workspace.inviteBody: Joining gives you access to this workspace's shared conversations, projects and knowledge bases. Your personal space stays separate.
workspace.inviteMissingTitle: This invite link is no longer valid
workspace.inviteMissingBody: It may have been reset by the workspace owner. Ask them for a fresh link.
